message:
br-bd-h5x: close EPIC (raw syscalls + futex pthread primitives delivered)

Acceptance: zero libc::syscall calls across abi + core (verified by
grep returning only a single doc comment), raw syscall layer in
frankenlibc-core/src/syscall/raw.rs with inline asm on x86_64 and
aarch64, and pthread primitives using raw_syscall::sys_futex.
